tools.name: capture_requirements
tools.description: Stores the discovered problem context, budget context, and data requirements in a structured consultation record.

tools.name: diagnose_solution_path
tools.description: Classifies the captured requirements into a scenario and recommends the best-fit solution path from the taxonomy.

tools.name: generate_proposal
tools.description: Builds the final consultation proposal from a diagnosed scenario and renders it in the UI.
